message:
feat(ffs-btrfs): implement read-only tree-walk with I/O-agnostic callback (bd-o76)

Add walk_tree() that descends from a root logical address through
internal nodes to leaves, collecting (BtrfsKey, payload) entries.
Uses chunk mapping for logical→physical translation and a caller-
provided read callback for I/O. 4 tests cover single leaf, internal+
leaves, unmapped address, and empty leaf cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
